title: Battle Dungeons
description: A new type of dungeon, containing lots of loot and challenges!
body:
Are you ready for lots of loot, adventure and challenges?
If so, this mod is for you!

In this mod, there is:
- A new type of dungeon
- A new set of armour and tools (it's red!!!)
- A new ingot

The Battle Dungeon features:
- Mob spawners in most rooms
- No creepers
- Chests with half-decent loot
- Valuables rooms with diamond, iron, gold and emerald blocks
- Prison rooms
- Kitchen rooms
- Garden room
- Brewery
- Anvil rooms (what am I supposed to call it)
- and more!!!!

The Dungeon Ingot can be rarley found in the dungeon's valuables chests, in the valuables room.

This mod is inspired by Rougelike Dungeons and Battle Towers

Feel free to add this mod to your modrinth modpack

Made by mautip for [Creamers Inc.](https://modrinth.com/organization/creamers-inc) <3
